questionHtml: Describe the relationship between Zooxanthellae and reef-building coral species.
markschemeHtml:
a. «endo»symbiotic/mutualistic relationship

b. zooxanthellae/photosynthetic algae/dinoflagellates live in coral tissues

c. coral provides protection for algae/dinoflagellates

d. algae/dinoflagellates provide minerals/products of photosynthesis/oxygen/sugars to coral

[Max 2 Marks]

meta.title: Describe the relationship between Zooxanthellae and reef-building coral species.
breadcrumbLabels: Option C: Ecology and conservation (Core topics)
